landing.title: Calendar
landing.subtitle: Book a meeting in a minute: choose an event type and a time that works for you.
landing.feature1: Pick an event type and a convenient time for your meeting.
landing.feature2: Fast booking with confirmation and optional notes.
landing.feature3: Manage meeting types and see upcoming bookings in the admin area.

booking.selectTypeHint: Click a card to open the calendar and choose a slot.

confirm.title: Confirm booking
confirm.subtitle: Review your selection and add an optional name.
confirm.conflict: That slot was just taken. Please pick another time.

admin.eventTypesEmptyHint: Create one to start accepting bookings for that format.
admin.name: Name
admin.deleteBlocked: Cannot delete: future bookings exist for this type.

errors.network: Could not reach the API. Is it running?
errors.retryHint: If you use the OpenAPI mock, run `make prism-mock` from the repo root (port 4010).
